reviews.summary: A wonderful location for a very peaceful and relaxing break
reviews.positive: Well equipped, comfortable, far from traffic.
reviews.negative: Nothing but for ourselves it would have been an advantage to have a smart tv.

reviews.positive: Brilliant cottage - very clean and tidy, and very quiet. We were welcomed with fresh eggs and homemade jam, both of which were delicious. Ideal location as close to a lot of things.
reviews.negative: The bed could do with a topper, otherwise everything was great.

reviews.positive: A very well set out cottage, with excellent facilities in a central location. We were planning a lot of walking across North Fife, and nowhere that we needed to be was more than half an hour's drive away. Brian and Rosalind could not have been more friendly or helpful. There are USB sockets scattered throughout the property, which is a very considerate addition. We were provided with a pot of homemade jam and eggs from their own chickens on arrival, which was a lovely addition.
reviews.negative: Bed sags a little in the middle. No Smart TV so we had to watch digital TV channels (Britbox, primarily) on our laptop. Even something like a Chromecast would be a useful addition. But these are minor niggles.

reviews.summary: Very comfortable cottage with everything you needed to make to a perfect stay.
reviews.positive: Great hosts, lovely clean and well equipped cottage. Fresh eggs, home made jam and a decent coffee were an unexpected bonus.
